name: Dovi (Peanut Butter Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large stew pot over moderate heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in garlic, salt, pepper, and chili pepper; cook for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add chicken pieces and green bell peppers; stir occasionally until chicken browns on all sides.
5. Mash tomatoes with a fork and mix into the stew along with water. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Thin the peanut butter with hot broth from the pot. Stir in half of the peanut paste into the stew; continue simmering until chicken is well done.
7. Wash spinach and steam it until tender (use water clinging to the leaves). Drain and stir into the remaining peanut paste.
8. Serve the stew with steamed greens.
Serves 4-6.
Per serving: 410 calories, 31g protein, 14g carbohydrate, 27g fat (8g saturated), 100mg cholesterol, 576mg sodium, 5g fiber.
